name: Cabbage Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the cabbage, bouillon, paprika, water, and cornstarch.
2. Core the cabbage and steam until the leaves are loose and soft enough to roll.
3. Place the meat mixture in the center of a cabbage leaf and roll it up tightly.
4. Arrange the cabbage rolls in a casserole dish.
5. Dissolve the bouillon cubes in hot water and pour into the casserole dish.
6. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for 30 to 45 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through.
7. Remove the cabbage rolls from the casserole dish and place them on a serving dish.
8. Heat the liquid in a saucepan to boiling.
9. Add paprika and cracked black pepper to taste.
10. Thicken the mixture with cornstarch dissolved in water until it reaches a gravy consistency.
11. Pour the sauce over the cabbage rolls.
